---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the problem you're trying to solve. What limitation or frustration are you running into?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to happen. If you have a specific implementation in mind, outline it here.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? What are the trade-offs?

## Context

Any additional context — how this would fit into your workflow, how many users it might affect, whether it relates to an existing feature.
